post_excerpt: Saves time and labor, easy to install. High brightness, high grayscale, high refresh rate, high-definition and delicate. Meets the requirements of hanging and stacking installation, and satisfies both indoor and outdoor requirements. The P°CB adopts a high-strength anti-collision pad design, which can withstand an impact of 8kg without fear of dead or dropped lights. The cabinet is thin and light, making disassembly, assembly, and transportation easy, reducing product thickness and saving screen space. Precise, fast, and flexible positioning installation can effectively respond to different application fields.

post_title: Smart Mobile LED Poster Screen P1.86 — High-Definition Indoor Digital Signage
post_excerpt: Premium High-Definition Mobile LED Poster Screen P1.86 features an ultra-slim aluminum cabinet (45kg complete unit) with built-in castor wheels and kickstand. Engineered with smart cloud clustering control, USB offline playback, and 1200 nit brightness. The ideal plug-and-play digital signage for retail shops, hotels, exhibitions, and flagship store fronts.
